note: seq=96: make InterServer's REAL rate surface + keep queue full. (1) Patched atlas_rate_bridge reads InterServer's AUTHORITATIVE self-report (status/interserver/enrich-async-interserver.json enriched_per_min ~155-180) as the InterServer number, falling back to claimed-by-interserver liveness / active-conn-share, and Hetzner = combined - InterServer. So by_box.interserver.per_min shows a STABLE real number instead of 0-at-samples. (2) Backfill bumped 50k/20min -> 100k/10min so neither box starves (it briefly hit queue_remaining=97). NOTE: InterServer must publish its self-report -- its async service needs EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/autopull.env (for STATUS_TOKEN); one-line fix relayed to user. Bridge verified complete (89L, __main__, compiles).

steps.note: seq=96: rate-bridge reads InterServer self-report + bigger backfill (never-starve).

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_rate_bridge.py':'5e75cdba5e852b92a1baac7ac32c16cb469ee969e23d4e3de84471d17c769d48'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('rate sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS continuous re-enrichment backfill (keeps both boxes busy; bounded)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=15
IOSchedulingClass=idle
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
Environment=ATLAS_REQUEUE_N=100000
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_requeue.py 100000
TimeoutStartSec=180

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS backfill timer (10min -- never-starve)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=1min
OnUnitActiveSec=10min
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import subprocess as s; s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-rate-bridge.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-rate-bridge.service']); s.run(['systemctl','restart','atlas-backfill.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-backfill.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-backfill.service']); print('rate-bridge(self-report) + bigger backfill live')"
